documents.title: IMS SQL Script
documents.content:
CREATE DATABASE IMS;

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE TABLE CUSTOMERS(
CUSTOMER_ID INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY identity,
FNAME VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
LNAME VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
EMAIL VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
ADDRESS VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
CONTACT VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
POSTAL_CODE INTEGER
);

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE TABLE EMPLOYEES(
EMPLOYEE_ID INT NOT NULL identity,
FNAME VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
LNAME VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
JOINING_DATE VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
JOB_TITLE VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
CONTACT VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
SALARY DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
PRIMARY KEY(EMPLOYEE_ID)
);

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE TABLE WAREHOUSE(
WAREHOUSE_ID INT NOT NULL identity,
WAREHOUSE_NAME VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
LOCATION VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
CONTACT VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
PRIMARY KEY(WAREHOUSE_ID)
);

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE TABLE SHIPMENT(
SHIPMENT_ID INT NOT NULL identity,
SHIPMENT_METHOD VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
SHIPMENT_DATE DATE NOT NULL,
CARRIER_INFO VARCHAR(255),
SHIPMENT_LOCATION VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
PRIMARY KEY(SHIPMENT_ID)
);

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE TABLE ORDER_STATUS(
STATUS_ID INT NOT NULL identity,
STATUS_NAME VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
DESCRIPTION VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
PRIMARY KEY(STATUS_ID)
);

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE TABLE UNITS(
UNIT_ID INT NOT NULL identity,
UNIT_NAME VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
DESCRIPTION VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
PRIMARY KEY(UNIT_ID)
);

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE TABLE BRANDS(
BRAND_ID INT NOT NULL identity,
BRAND_NAME VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
DESCRIPTION VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
PRIMARY KEY(BRAND_ID)
);

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE TABLE CATEGORIES(
CATEGORY_ID INT NOT NULL identity,
CATEGORY_NAME VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
DESCRIPTION VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
PRIMARY KEY(CATEGORY_ID)
);

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE TABLE SUPPLIERS(
SUPPLIER_ID INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY identity,
NAME VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
EMAIL VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
ADDRESS VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
CONTACT VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL
);

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE TABLE ORDERS(
ORDER_ID INT NOT NULL identity,
CUSTOMER_ID INT NOT NULL,
ORDER_DATE DATE NOT NULL,
ORDER_STATUS_ID INT NOT NULL,
SHIPMENT_ID INT NOT NULL,
CONSTRAINT FK_CUSTOMER_ORDER_ID FOREIGN KEY (CUSTOMER_ID) REFERENCES CUSTOMERS(CUSTOMER_ID),
CONSTRAINT FK_ORDER_STATUS_ID FOREIGN KEY (ORDER_STATUS_ID) REFERENCES ORDER_STATUS(STATUS_ID),
CONSTRAINT FK_SHIPMENT_ORDER_ID FOREIGN KEY (SHIPMENT_ID) REFERENCES SHIPMENT(SHIPMENT_ID),
PRIMARY KEY(ORDER_ID)
);

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE TABLE PRODUCTS(
PRODUCT_ID INT NOT NULL identity,
NAME VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
PRODUCT_CODE VARCHAR(255) unique NOT NULL,
UNIT_PRICE DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
SELL_PRICE DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
SUPPLIER_ID INT NOT NULL,
DISCOUNT DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
BRAND_ID INT NOT NULL,
UNIT_ID INT NOT NULL,
CATEGORY_ID INT NOT NULL,
CONSTRAINT FK_SUPPLIER_PRODUCT_ID FOREIGN KEY (SUPPLIER_ID) REFERENCES SUPPLIERS(SUPPLIER_ID),
CONSTRAINT FK_BRAND_PRODUCT_ID FOREIGN KEY (BRAND_ID) REFERENCES BRANDS(BRAND_ID),
CONSTRAINT FK_UNIT_PRODUCT_ID FOREIGN KEY (UNIT_ID) REFERENCES UNITS(UNIT_ID),
CONSTRAINT FK_CATEGORY_PRODUCT_ID FOREIGN KEY (CATEGORY_ID) REFERENCES CATEGORIES(CATEGORY_ID),
PRIMARY KEY(PRODUCT_ID)
);

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE TABLE PRODUCT_ITEM(
ITEM_ID INT NOT NULL identity,
PRODUCT_ID INT NOT NULL,
DETAIL VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
WEIGHT DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
CONSTRAINT FK_PRODUCT_ITEM_ID FOREIGN KEY (PRODUCT_ID) REFERENCES PRODUCTS(PRODUCT_ID),
PRIMARY KEY(ITEM_ID)
);

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE TABLE ORDER_CART(
PRODUCT_ID INT NOT NULL,
ORDER_ID INT NOT NULL,
QUANTITY INT NOT NULL,
TOTAL_COST DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
CONSTRAINT FK_PRODUCT_ORDER_ID FOREIGN KEY (PRODUCT_ID) REFERENCES PRODUCTS(PRODUCT_ID),
CONSTRAINT FK_PRODUCT_ORDERS_ID FOREIGN KEY (ORDER_ID) REFERENCES ORDERS(ORDER_ID),
primary key(PRODUCT_ID,ORDER_ID)
);

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE TABLE INVENTORY(
INVENTORY_ID INT NOT NULL identity,
QUANTITY INT NOT NULL,
PRODUCT_ID INT NOT NULL,
WAREHOUSE_ID INT NOT NULL,
CONSTRAINT FK_PRODUCT_INVENTORY_ID FOREIGN KEY (PRODUCT_ID) REFERENCES PRODUCTS(PRODUCT_ID),
CONSTRAINT FK_WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ID FOREIGN KEY (WAREHOUSE_ID) REFERENCES WAREHOUSE(WAREHOUSE_ID),
PRIMARY KEY(INVENTORY_ID)
);

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE TABLE ORDER_RETURN(
CUSTOMER_ID INT NOT NULL,
ORDER_ID INT NOT NULL,
RETURN_STATUS VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
REASON VARCHAR(255),
CONSTRAINT FK_CUSTOMER_RETURN_ID FOREIGN KEY (CUSTOMER_ID) REFERENCES CUSTOMERS(CUSTOMER_ID),
CONSTRAINT FK_ORDER_ORDER_RETURN_ID FOREIGN KEY (ORDER_ID) REFERENCES ORDERS(ORDER_ID),
PRIMARY KEY(CUSTOMER_ID,ORDER_ID)
);

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE TABLE INVOICE(
INVOICE_ID INT NOT NULL identity,
ORDER_ID INT NOT NULL,
INVOICE_NUMBER INT NOT NULL,
TOTAL_PRICE DECIMAL(10,2) NULL,
CONSTRAINT FK_ORDERED_ID FOREIGN KEY (ORDER_ID) REFERENCES ORDERS(ORDER_ID),
PRIMARY KEY(INVOICE_ID)
);

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE TABLE SALES(
SALE_ID INT NOT NULL identity,
ORDER_ID INT NOT NULL,
CONSTRAINT FK_ORDER_SALE_ID FOREIGN KEY (ORDER_ID) REFERENCES ORDERS(ORDER_ID),
PRIMARY KEY(SALE_ID)
);

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE TABLE PURCHASE(
PURCHASE_ID INT NOT NULL identity,
PURCHASE_PRICE DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
PURCHASE_DATE DATE NOT NULL,
SUPPLIER_ID INT NOT NULL,
CONSTRAINT FK_SUPPLIER_PURCHASE_ID FOREIGN KEY (SUPPLIER_ID) REFERENCES SUPPLIERS(SUPPLIER_ID),
PRIMARY KEY(PURCHASE_ID)
);

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE TABLE PURCHASE_PRODUCT(
PURCHASE_ID INT NOT NULL,
PRODUCT_ID INT NOT NULL,
QUANTITY INT NOT NULL,
UNIT_PRICE DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
TOTAL_PRICE DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
CONSTRAINT FK_PURCHASE_PRODUCT_ID FOREIGN KEY (PURCHASE_ID) REFERENCES PURCHASE(PURCHASE_ID),
CONSTRAINT FK_PURCHASE_PRODUCTS_ID FOREIGN KEY (PRODUCT_ID) REFERENCES PRODUCTS(PRODUCT_ID),
PRIMARY KEY(PURCHASE_ID,PRODUCT_ID)
);

ALTER TABLE PRODUCTS DROP FOREIGN KEY FK_SUPPLIER_PRODUCT_ID;
Alter table products drop column SUPPLIER_ID;
-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE FUNCTION add_or_update_inventory(
@p_product_id INT,
@p_warehouse_id INT,
@p_quantity INT
)
RETURNS VARCHAR(100)
BEGIN
DECLARE @v_existing_quantity INT;

-- SQLINES DEMO *** uct already exists in the specified warehouse
-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
SELECT @v_existing_quantity = QUANTITY
FROM INVENTORY
WHERE PRODUCT_ID = @p_product_id
AND WAREHOUSE_ID = @p_warehouse_id;

IF @v_existing_quantity IS NULL BEGIN
-- SQLINES DEMO *** ory for the product
-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
INSERT INTO INVENTORY (QUANTITY, PRODUCT_ID, WAREHOUSE_ID)
VALUES (@p_quantity, @p_product_id, @p_warehouse_id);

RETURN 'New inventory added.';
END
ELSE BEGIN
-- SQLINES DEMO *** ng inventory quantity
UPDATE INVENTORY
SET QUANTITY = @v_existing_quantity + @p_quantity
WHERE PRODUCT_ID = @p_product_id
AND WAREHOUSE_ID = @p_warehouse_id;

RETURN 'Inventory updated.';
END
RETURN NULL;
END;
GO


-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
SELECT dbo.add_or_update_inventory(5, 1, 15);
delete from inventory where inventory_id=1;

DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS update_order_return;

DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS update_order_return;


-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE FUNCTION update_order_return(
@Customer_id INT,
@Order_id INT,
@Return_Statuss VARCHAR(100)
) RETURNS VARCHAR(100)
BEGIN
DECLARE @product_id INT;
DECLARE @product_quantity INT;

IF @Return_Statuss = 'Rejected' BEGIN
UPDATE ORDER_RETURN
SET RETURN_STATUS = @Return_Statuss
WHERE @Customer_id = @Customer_id AND @Order_id = @Order_id;

RETURN 'Order status updated to Rejected';
END
ELSE IF @Return_Statuss = 'Accepted' BEGIN
-- SQLINES DEMO *** and quantities from ORDER_CART table
UPDATE INVENTORY i
SET i.QUANTITY = i.QUANTITY + (
SELECT cc.QUANTITY
FROM ORDER_CART cc
WHERE cc.ORDER_ID = @Order_id
AND i.PRODUCT_ID = cc.PRODUCT_ID
)
WHERE i.PRODUCT_ID IN (
SELECT c.PRODUCT_ID
FROM ORDER_CART c
WHERE c.ORDER_ID = @Order_id
);

-- SQLINES DEMO *** rn status
UPDATE ORDER_RETURN
SET RETURN_STATUS = @Return_Statuss
WHERE @Customer_id = @Customer_id AND @Order_id = @Order_id;

RETURN 'Order status updated to Accepted';
END

RETURN '';
END;
GO

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE FUNCTION New_Order(
@Customer_id INT,
@Order_status_id INT,
@Order_date DATE,
@shipment_id INT,
@Quantity_list VARCHAR(max),
@product_list VARCHAR(max)
) RETURNS INT
BEGIN
DECLARE @order_id INT;
DECLARE @product_id INT;
DECLARE @Quantity INT;
DECLARE @Total_cost INT;
DECLARE @product_count INT;
DECLARE @Sell_price DECIMAL(10, 2);
DECLARE @i INT;
Declare @t_sum DECIMAL(10, 2);

-- SQLINES DEMO *** into the ORDERS table
-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
INSERT INTO ORDERS (CUSTOMER_ID, ORDER_DATE, ORDER_STATUS_ID, SHIPMENT_ID)
VALUES (@Customer_id, @Order_date, @Order_status_id, @shipment_id);

-- SQLINES DEMO *** rted order ID
SET @order_id = dbo.LAST_INSERT_ID();

-- SQLINES DEMO *** products in the product_list
SET @product_count = dbo.JSON_LENGTH(@product_list);
-- SQLINES DEMO *** t = JSON_LENGTH(quantity_list);
SET @i = 0;
SET @t_sum=0;
WHILE @i < @product_count BEGIN
-- SQLINES DEMO *** d at the current index
SET @product_id = dbo.JSON_EXTRACT(@product_list, CONCAT('$[', @i, ']'));
SET @Quantity = dbo.JSON_EXTRACT(@Quantity_list, CONCAT('$[', @i, ']'));

-- SQLINES DEMO *** uct exists in the PRODUCTS table

-- SQLINES DEMO *** e of the product
SELECT @Sell_price = p.SELL_PRICE
FROM PRODUCTS p
WHERE p.PRODUCT_ID = @product_id
;
SET @Total_cost = @Quantity * @Sell_price;

-- SQLINES DEMO *** the product in the ORDER_CART table
-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
INSERT INTO ORDER_CART (PRODUCT_ID, ORDER_ID, QUANTITY, TOTAL_COST)
VALUES (@product_id, @order_id, @Quantity, @Total_cost);
SET @t_sum = @t_sum + (@Quantity * @Sell_price);
-- SQLINES DEMO *** ory quantity
UPDATE INVENTORY i
SET i.QUANTITY = i.QUANTITY - @Quantity
WHERE i.PRODUCT_ID = @product_id;

SET @i = @i + 1;
END;

UPDATE ORDERS s
SET s.TOTAL_COST = @t_sum
WHERE s.ORDER_ID = @order_id;
RETURN @order_id;
END;
GO


-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
select dbo.New_Order(1,2,"2022-01-15",1,"[2,2]","[5,2]");
-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
CREATE FUNCTION add_invoice(
@order_id INT,
@invoice_number INT,
@tax DECIMAL(10, 2)
) RETURNS VARCHAR(100)
BEGIN
DECLARE @total_cost DECIMAL(10, 2);

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
SELECT @total_cost = s.TOTAL_COST
FROM ORDERS s
WHERE s.ORDER_ID = @order_id;

SET @total_cost = @total_cost + @tax;

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
INSERT INTO invoice (ORDER_ID, INVOICE_NUMBER, TOTAL_PRICE)
VALUES (@order_id, @invoice_number, @total_cost);

RETURN 'Record Inserted In Invoice';
END;
GO


-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
select * from sales;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS add_invoice;
-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
select dbo.add_invoice(41,0001,100);

select * from suppliers;
-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
select * from purchase;
-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
select * from purchase_product;
ALTER TABLE purchase DROP COLUMN PURCHASE_PRICE;
ALTER TABLE purchase ADD purchase_price DECIMAL(10, 2);

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
create function New_Purchase(
@product_id_list Varchar(max),
@quantity_list Varchar(max),
@unit_price_list Varchar(max),
@supplier_id int
)
RETURNS Varchar(100)
Begin
declare @total_cost DECIMAL(10, 2);
declare @product_id int;
declare @purchase_id int;
declare @product_count int;
declare @unit_price DECIMAL(10, 2);
declare @Quantity int;
declare @i int;
declare @t_sum int;

SET @product_count = dbo.JSON_LENGTH(@product_id_list);
-- SQLINES DEMO *** t = JSON_LENGTH(quantity_list);
SET @i = 0;
SET @total_cost=0;
SET @t_sum=0;
-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
insert into purchase(PURCHASE_DATE, SUPPLIER_ID) values(CURDATE(), @supplier_id);
SET @purchase_id = dbo.LAST_INSERT_ID();

WHILE @i < @product_count BEGIN
-- SQLINES DEMO *** d at the current index
SET @Product_id = dbo.JSON_EXTRACT(@product_id_list, CONCAT('$[', @i, ']'));
SET @Quantity = dbo.JSON_EXTRACT(@quantity_list, CONCAT('$[', @i, ']'));
SET @Unit_price = dbo.JSON_EXTRACT(@unit_price_list, CONCAT('$[', @i, ']'));
SET @total_cost = @unit_price * @Quantity;
SET @t_sum = @t_sum + @total_cost;
-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
insert into purchase_product(PURCHASE_ID, PRODUCT_ID, QUANTITY, UNIT_PRICE,TOTAL_PRICE)
values (@purchase_id, @product_id, @Quantity, @unit_price, @total_cost);

SET @i = @i + 1;

END;
update purchase p set p.purchase_price = @t_sum where p.purchase_id = @purchase_id;

RETURN 'Purchase Record Inserted';
END;
GO
-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
select * from payment;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS New_Purchase;
-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
select dbo.New_Purchase("[2,5]","[10,15]","[5,4]",1);


-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
create table Payment_Type(
payment_type_id INT NOT NULL identity,
name varchar(100) not null,
description varchar(255),
primary key (payment_type_id)
);

-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
create table payment_customer(
payment_id INT NOT NULL identity,
payment_type int,
amount DECIMAL(10, 2) not null,
invoice_id int,
payment_date date,
primary key(payment_id),
CONSTRAINT FK_payment_Customer_ID FOREIGN KEY (invoice_id) REFERENCES invoice(INVOICE_ID),
CONSTRAINT FK_payment_type_ID FOREIGN KEY (payment_type) REFERENCES Payment_Type(payment_type_id)
);


-- SQLINES LICENSE FOR EVALUATION USE ONLY
create table payment_supplier(
payment_id INT NOT NULL identity,
payment_type int,
amount DECIMAL(10, 2) not null,
purchase_id int,
payment_date date,
primary key(payment_id),
CONSTRAINT FK_payment_Supplier_ID FOREIGN KEY (purchase_id) REFERENCES purchase(PURCHASE_ID),
CONSTRAINT FK_payment_types_ID FOREIGN KEY (payment_type) REFERENCES Payment_Type(payment_type_id)
);
